name: Ladki Bahin Yojana
description: Financial assistance for women between 21-60 years under state welfare programs.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Scheme promoting education and welfare for girl children.
eligibility: Parents of girl children below 18 years.

name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
description: Low-interest loan program to empower rural women through self-employment.
eligibility: Rural women with small business interest.

name: Skill India for Women
description: Skill development and certification opportunities for women seeking jobs or self-employment.
eligibility: Women and girls looking for vocational training.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Maternal health support for pregnant women and safe delivery assistance.
eligibility: Pregnant women meeting public health criteria.
